response.reasoning: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement (2006–2026 career span, ~20 years) and holds a BS in Computer Science from MIT. He demonstrates strong full-stack builder fluency across multiple platforms and languages, plus entrepreneurial experience founding GISCollective. However, this role requires specialized expertise in AI strategy with preferred qualifications in AI (Master's/PhD, recognized AI products/platforms). The resume shows ~14 months of direct AI work at re:cinq (April 2025–present) focused on MCP and agent infrastructure, with no prior demonstrated products or platforms built with AI and no AI-specific degree. Additionally, the role requires director-level individual contributor experience with strategic advisory capability, while the resume shows senior/staff IC progression with mentorship but no evidence of strategic customer advisory or product future-state identification.
strengths: 20 years of continuous technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure with demonstrated ability to rapidly learn across domains and technologies

Strong software craftsmanship and full-stack builder fluency: multiple languages, shipped products (Apple TV top 10 app), and founder of operational GISCollective open-source platform used by organizations like Green Map
Active knowledge sharing and mentorship through workshops, courses, refactoring dojos, and community engagement; open-source contributions and public technical presence
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI expertise: ~14 months of direct AI work (MCP/agent infrastructure); no Master's/PhD in AI field; no prior products or platforms built with AI showing recognized domain leadership

Career progression shows senior/staff IC levels, but role requires director-level individual contributor with strategic leadership; no evidence of advising strategic customers or identifying cloud product future states
Cloud and AI are recent focus; primary career has been full-stack web/mobile/embedded development; cloud platform strategy does not appear core to background

key_factors.factor: Entrepreneurial and mentorship leadership track record

response.justification: The candidate is an exceptionally capable senior engineer with two decades of experience and proven ability to build, architect, and lead across full stacks. However, this role explicitly requires a principal engineer with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated strategic leadership in AI/cloud strategy—neither are evident. While the recent pivot to AI work at re:cinq is encouraging, 14 months is insufficient to establish the "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI" specified as preferred. The resume positions the candidate as an elite senior engineer, not yet a principal-level AI strategy leader.
